testcase.failure:

testcase.name: testGetStatisticNotFound

failure.message: [Should return 404 or 200 with empty array] Expecting actual: 400 to be in: [200, 404]

testcase.failure:
java.lang.AssertionError: [Should return 404 or 200 with empty array] Expecting actual: 400 to be in: [200, 404]
